title: byrsopteris standishii
intro: Byrsopteris standishii, also known as the Standish's fern, is a species of extinct fern that lived during the Carboniferous period. Although it is no longer found in nature, research on this plant has revealed its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Byrsopteris standishii are thought to include soothing skin irritations and wound healing, thanks to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. However, due to its extinction, herbal preparations of Byrsopteris standishii are not commercially available, and research on its medicinal uses is limited to laboratory studies and fossil records.
